title: magnolia × soulangeana
intro: Magnolia × soulangeana, also known as the saucer magnolia, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Magnoliaceae family. The bark and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of magnolia × soulangeana include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The bark can be used to make herbal preparations such as tea, tincture, and infusion, which can be consumed to reap its benefits.
